degraded.detail: classify_complexity flagged touches_migrations from message prose only; overridden -- there are no migrations in the diff. F11 recomputes risk flags from the diff, which carries no supabase/migrations path.

surface_verification.justification: P1 ships framework-level frozen contracts (traceability manifest v2 JSON Schema, requirement-model + @FR tag-grammar Python modules) plus a test-harness/fixture package. No startable, user-experienceable surface exists (no web/API/CLI app affordance) and no backend-affects-frontend change. Fully exercised by the shared + compliance pytest suites at F0 (18 units GREEN) and an adversarial GPT+Gemini+Codex panel (AC4).

behaviors.behavior: AC1 manifest schema is a valid Draft 2020-12 schema; schema_version const is 2
AC1 golden example + golden manifest validate against the schema
AC1 malformed instances rejected (schema_version, id pattern, executed enum, additionalProperties)
AC1/R1 schema enforces skipped != covered: coverage 'ok' requires an enabled+pass test link
AC1 schema enforces removed FR => no live tests
AC1 schema requires a coverage entry for every required layer
AC1 schema enforces each test link's layer matches its group (no unit coverage from an e2e link)
AC1 orphan tagged_fr: null only for unmapped; confirmed_orphan requires a real FR id
AC1/R5 MODEL_VERSION tracks the manifest schema_version const (both 2)
AC2 all four @FR grammar forms bind to a test (pytest marker / // @covers / native tag / title suffix)
AC2 malformed tags -> invalid_tags (single-digit, non-string arg, trailing junk, non-canonical), bound or not
AC2 binding is strict: // @covers adjacency + same-line, title suffix only, test.describe excluded
AC2 exported TAG_TOKEN_RE rejects trailing continuations (@FR-01.03x / .4 / 033)
AC2 pytest 'covers' marker registered in the compliance + root pyproject
AC2/AC3 fixture mini-repo exercises all four tag_sources and binds the expected FRs; only FR-1.3 invalid; untagged test unbound
AC3 fixture package loads: mini-repo, diffs (incl refactor), evidence (incl skipped), decisions, golden report, catalog paths
behaviors.evidence: test_minirepo_loads, test_diffs_load_with_expected_verdicts, test_evidence_loads_including_skipped, test_predeclared_decisions_load, test_golden_report_snapshot_present, test_catalog_paths_all_resolve

behaviors.behavior: AC3/R1 normalized evidence index agrees with the raw Playwright report (skipped -> not_run)
AC3/R3 diff scenarios are self-contained: linked/required-layer tests exist in base+head trees
AC3/R4 LLM adapter replays offline; refuses bodies (disallowed key / over-long field / non-canonical candidate_frs); forces auto_write=false
AC3 property-4 golden correct: golden manifest matches the reference parser + execution evidence (bindings, tag_source, invalid, orphans, coverage)
AC4 adversarial-panel judgment of the four key properties (skipped!=covered, removal flagged, refactor not blocked, golden correct)
behaviors.evidence: verified by the GPT-5.6 + Gemini 3.1 + Codex panel RUN over 4 rounds to convergence (non-degraded); verdicts recorded in the iterate spec's Adversarial-panel section
